<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Argument\Search\SchemaFields; class GeoShapeField extends AbstractField { public const COORD_FLAT = 'FLAT'; /** * @param string $identifier * @param string $alias * @param bool|string $sortable * @param bool $noIndex * @param string|null $coordSystem Constants that represents available systems available on a class level. */ public function __construct( string $identifier, string $alias = '', $sortable = self::NOT_SORTABLE, bool $noIndex = false, ?string $coordSystem = null ) { $this->fieldArguments[] = $identifier; if ($alias !== '') { $this->fieldArguments[] = 'AS'; $this->fieldArguments[] = $alias; } $this->fieldArguments[] = 'GEOSHAPE'; if (null !== $coordSystem) { $this->fieldArguments[] = $coordSystem; } if ($sortable === self::SORTABLE) { $this->fieldArguments[] = 'SORTABLE'; } elseif ($sortable === self::SORTABLE_UNF) { $this->fieldArguments[] = 'SORTABLE'; $this->fieldArguments[] = 'UNF'; } if ($noIndex) { $this->fieldArguments[] = 'NOINDEX'; } } }
